# Deliverable 3c: tiny<sub>stories1m</sub>.sv generated by CIRCT

Reference:

- docs/project-plan<sub>v2</sub>.org:216

Definition:

- 3c) tiny<sub>stories1m</sub>.sv, generated by CIRCT

Gate:

``` bash
nix build .#tiny-stories-1m-baseline-float-sv -L
```

Artifact:

- `/nix/store/...-tiny-stories-1m-baseline-float-sv/sv/main.sv`
- `/nix/store/...-tiny-stories-1m-baseline-float-sv/sources.f`

Note:

- CIRCT output is emitted as split SystemVerilog for the
  `baseline-float` Task 3 oute; `sv/main.sv` is the main design file.
